headline.title: Broadcom 预测不佳拖累美股从纪录高位回落，油价下跌
headline.summary: 美股从纪录高位回落，因 Broadcom 业绩展望不及预期，打击 AI 芯片交易动能；同时油价走低，中东不确定性持续。印尼市场因政策风险暴跌，卢比跌破 18,000。市场关注美联储加息前景。
headline.title_en: Stocks Fall From Record on Broadcom Miss, Oil Dips: Markets Wrap
headline.summary_en: Stocks pulled back from record levels after a weak forecast from Broadcom Inc. dented momentum in the AI trade; oil dipped amid Middle East uncertainty. Indonesian markets tumbled on policy risks, with the rupiah breaching 18,000 per dollar. Focus turns to Fed rate hike prospects.
headline.reason: 该事件将 AI 产业 (Broadcom 芯片) 与金融市场、地缘政治 (油价) 紧密关联，是当日最综合、影响最广的头条，涵盖财经理财、AI 科技和国际事务三大类。
headline.reason_en: This event ties together AI (Broadcom chips), financial markets, and geopolitics (oil), making it the most comprehensive and impactful lead story of the day, covering all three required sections: finance, AI/tech, and world affairs.
